Our wine selections focus on New World wines, predominantly from the United States. You can view a list of our offerings here, but please remember this list is subject to change. Call the restaurant or email us at
info@tableandmain.com
to see the most up-to-date list.

Join us for this $35 three-course menu each and every Monday year-round!
Appetizers
Mushroom & Pecan Bisque
sage brown butter, toasted pecans
Hogs ‘n Quilts
BBQ pork, chive crepe, home-style coleslaw, GA vinegar sauce
Garden Green Salad
fresh farm greens, asparagus, fennel, Benton’s country ham, fromage blanc, orange-rosemary vinegar, GA olive oil
Entrees
Shrimp ‘n Grits
Gulf shrimp, stone-ground grits, pork andouille, Creole brown gravy
Fried Chicken
southern-fried, all-natural Springer Mtn Farms chicken, guest’s choice of side
T&M Burger
Stone Mtn. Cattle Co. beef, pimento cheese, bacon-onion jam, pickles, fries
Desserts
Ice Cream
guest’s choice of vanilla or seasonal sorbet
Chocolate Puddin'
meringue, chocolate brownie, graham cracker crumble
$
12
/ WHILE SUPPLIES LAST /
Join us every Wednesday for Chef Woody's favorite:
juicy prime rib
served with savory rosemary jus, horseradish, and seasonal accompaniments! We're proud to feature
Chatel Farms
beef sourced locally from Reidsville, GA.
Current MKT Price: $62pp
This popular special item is available on a "first come, first served" basis. We are not able to guarantee requests ahead of time.
// SUNDAY FEB-8 //
// open 10am - 2pm //
